name: block-in-inline-006: onclick toggles display inline↔block
description: Click on body toggles #test between display:inline and display:block. Text should split into three separate lines when #test becomes block.

events.message: Step 1: Verify initial state — #test has class 'inline' (display:inline)
Step 2: Click body to toggle #test to block
Step 4: Click body again to toggle #test back to inline
Step 5: Verify #test is back to inline
